channel.title: Rubyonrails on adoption curve dot net
channel.description: Recent content in Rubyonrails on adoption curve dot net

item.title: Yet Another List Of Ruby And Rails Resources
item.description: One of the problems with learning Rails is knowing which of the thousands of resources to use. There are an ever-increasing number of books, blogs, screencasts and tutorials to choose from, all with their own take and idiosyncrasies. This is by no means a definitive list, but it’s the resources that I’ve found most useful. The canonical site The main site for all things Rails is rubyonrails.org, which is also the place to go for the source code and API documentation.
